description: Analysts track the booking curve (close-in vs forward), booked position vs optimal, wave-season pace and post-shock recovery trajectory to gauge forward yield visibility.

2022-Q2: close-in booking trend: cyclical post-COVID or structural
2022-Q4: wave season pace by brand and geography
2023-Q1: how strong close-in Q1 reshapes wave management and booking curve normalization
2023-Q2: booked position vs historical 55-60% turn-of-year benchmark
2024-Q1: strongest-ever wave continuation into April by region
2024-Q2: did leaving inventory on the table this year set up better 2025 booking curve
2024-Q3: booked position 'exactly where you want' and translation to margin
ad-budget cadence through hurricane/election noise into wave
2025-Q1: willingness to flex load factor to defend price in slowdown
2025-Q2: close-in momentum not embedded in H2 guide
2025-Q4: shorter (3-4 day) itineraries shifting mix toward close-in yield upside
2026-Q1: turning-the-corner trajectory vs February pre-disruption baseline

analyst_affinity.steven wieczynski: Anchors on booked position vs optimal and tests willingness to flex load factor versus price in a slowdown.
analyst_affinity.paul golding: Tracks whether close-in booking pattern is post-COVID transient or structural, and how it reshapes wave management.
analyst_affinity.brandt montour: Measures wave-season pace by brand and tests booked-position run vs peers.
analyst_affinity.vince ciepiel: Asks how the booking curve and ad-budget cadence interact through Q4 noise into wave season.
analyst_affinity.conor cunningham: Frames close-in skew (shorter itineraries) as a yield-optionality lever rather than a visibility loss.
analyst_affinity.matthew boss: Asks for booked-position color tied to margin and yield optimization.
analyst_affinity.james hardiman: Frames post-shock recovery as a trajectory question vs a pre-event baseline.

default_framing_options: close-in vs forward booking mix and what is embedded in guide
remaining inventory percent vs optimal booked position
recovery trajectory after booking moderation / wave-season pace
